# Let me look at the very first frame of Level 2 to understand the initial state
# Find the first frame where level == 2
for entry in history:

        for node in seg['nodes']:
            b = node['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            if min(rows) > 0:
                print(f"  color={node['color']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}] pixels={node['pixels']}")
        break
